title: SPICA Astronomy Camp 2025
author: SKA Club
content: Join us for the annual SPICA Astronomy Camp where we explore the night sky, learn about celestial navigation, and build our own telescopes.

title: New Telescope Equipment Arrival
author: SKA Club
content: The SKA Club has just received a brand new automated equatorial mount and an 8-inch Schmidt-Cassegrain telescope to enhance our observation sessions.

title: Meteor Shower Observation Night
author: SKA Club
content: Prepare for the Perseid meteor shower! We will be hosting an observation session at the school field starting from 8:00 PM.
